all_20_cases.interpretation: Negative rho = harder labels associated with lower baseline scores (expected if labels are valid)

non_defense_wins_15_cases.interpretation: Excludes defense_wins cases (baseline=0.0 by structural construction, not difficulty)

conclusion: Labels validated: rho=-0.3786 (negative, harder labels associate with lower baseline). Monotonic pattern: easy > medium > hard on baseline scores (non-defense_wins cases).
